description: Create a content slide with a two-column layout showing two horizontal bar charts on geopolitical risks to banking, plus a right-side image panel with a text callout.

header.headline: Figure 4: Top impacts from potential geopolitical risks and greatest risks to the banking sector

series.label: Shifts in trade policy and tariffs, such as economic sanctions or restrictions
Changes in fiscal policy (e.g., level of national debt, monetary policy, and currency devaluation)
Political or government instability (e.g., regime changes)
Physical security-related tensions or regional conflicts

right.body: Right-side illustrative image of a stage or audience scene with a callout box and report link.
